headline: Arm Holdings Has Doubled in 2026. Is It Outperforming Other Chip-IP Stocks Like Synopsys, Cadence, and Qualcomm?
summary: Shares of Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) are trading higher by 4% in midday action Tuesday, extending a year that has put the chip-IP designer in a class of its own among semiconductor design names. ARM stock is up 102% year to date (YTD) through Monday, thereby doubling in under five months. The rest of the chip-IP ... Arm Holdings Has Doubled in 2026. Is It Outperforming Other Chip-IP Stocks Like Synopsys, Cadence, and Qualcomm?
